title: Cobblemon Essentials
description: It is a lightweight collection of mods designed to enhance your Cobblemon gameplay while maintaining optimal performance.
body:
# **Cobblemon Essentials Modpack**

Explore the ultimate Cobblemon experience with the **Cobblemon Essentials Modpack**! This lightweight, carefully curated collection of mods enhances your gameplay with exciting new features and improvements without compromising performance. Dive into the world of Cobblemon like never before with the following highlights:

## 🌟 Key Features:

### 🛡️ Mega Evolution
Transform your Cobblemon into powerful Mega Evolutions with the **Ascension Megamons** addon.

### 🏇 Ride Your Cobblemon
Enable the ability to ride your Cobblemon for faster and more exciting travel with **CobblemonRider**.

### 🐉 Myths and Legends
Encounter Legendary and Mythical Pokémon with new key items and spawning conditions through the **Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon**.

### ⚔️ Dynamic Interactions
Experience a more immersive world where Pokémon will either flee or fight back when provoked, thanks to **Cobblemon - Fight or Flight**.

### 🌈 Shiny Alerts
Never miss a Legendary or Shiny Cobblemon spawn with **Cobblemon Spawn Notification**.

### 🎮 Challenging Battles
Test your skills and challenge friends to fair, flat-level Pokémon battles using **Cobblemon Challenge**.

### 🌟 Enhanced Spawning
Enjoy naturally spawning Hidden Abilities and increased shiny rates near your KOs and captures with **Cobblemon Unchained**.

### 📜 TMs and TRs
Teach moves to your Pokémon using TMs (Technical Machines) and TRs (Technical Records) with **SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon**.

### 📈 Capture XP
Grant EXP to your team when you capture a wild Pokémon with the **Cobblemon Capture XP** addon.

### 🥚 Pokémon Breeding
Enable early Pokémon breeding with the **Cobbreeding** side-mod for Cobblemon.

### 📊 Comprehensive Tracking
Keep meticulous records of your wild Cobblemon encounters and achievements with **Cobblemon Counter**.

### 🏥 Custom Pokécenters
Discover and utilize custom-built Pokécenters in Vanilla Villages with **Fuller's Pokecenters**.

### 📚 In-Game Wiki
Access a detailed in-game Pokémon encyclopedia using **Cobblepedia** for all your Cobblemon knowledge needs.

### 🛠️ Unimplemented Items
Add items that don't exist in Cobblemon yet with the **Cobblemon Unimplemented Items** addon.


---

Experience Cobblemon like never before with the **Cobblemon Essentials Modpack**! Enhance your adventure with these thrilling features and immerse yourself in the ultimate Pokémon world within Minecraft. Ready to embark on this enhanced journey? Download now and start your adventure today!
